Parameter.description: Parameter class for parameterized Plugins. This structure is intended to match that which is used in the OpenAPI function calling specification. It is used to define the parameters that a plugin can accept, and also for creating the function calling prompt api.

type.description: The data type of the parameter (one of: string, number, integer, boolean, object, array, null).

enum.description: A list of allowed values for the parameter. Example: ['Celsius', 'Fahrenheit']
enum.title: Enum

default.description: The default value of the parameter, if any.
default.title: Default

Parameter.title: Parameter

SAMPluginCommonMetadata.description: Smarter API Plugin Manifest - common Metadata class.

name.description: The camelCase name of the manifest resource
name.title: Name

description.description: The description for this resource. Be brief. Keep it under 255 characters.
description.title: Description

version.description: The semantic version of the manifest. Example: 0.1.0
version.title: Version

tags.description: The tags of the manifest. Used for generic resource categorization and search. Example: ['tag1', 'tag2']
tags.title: Tags

annotations.description: The manifest annotations. Used for storing arbitrary metadata as key-value pairs. Example: [{'smarter.sh/test-manifest/project-name': 'Scooby dooby do'}]. The key should be a valid url-friendly string. The value accepts multi-line string values (YAML block scalars) and various scalar types including str, int, float, bool, datetime.date, datetime.datetime, decimal.Decimal, uuid.UUID, bytes, list, dict.
annotations.title: Annotations

pluginClass.description: The class of the plugin. one of: ['static', 'api', 'sql']
pluginClass.title: Pluginclass

SAMPluginCommonMetadata.title: SAMPluginCommonMetadata

SAMPluginCommonSpecPrompt.description: Smarter API Plugin Manifest - Spec - Prompt class.

provider.description: Plugin.spec.prompt.provider[str]. Optional. The provider of the LLM. Defaults to openai. The provider is the vendor name for the LLM service that will be used to generate the prompt response.
provider.title: Provider

systemRole.description: Plugin.spec.prompt.systemRole[str]. Required. The system role that the Plugin will use for the LLM text completion prompt. Be verbose and specific. Ensure that systemRole accurately conveys to the LLM how you want it to use the Plugin data that is returned.
systemRole.title: Systemrole

model.description: Plugin.spec.prompt.model[str] Optional. The model of the Plugin. Defaults to gpt-4o-mini. Must be one of: ['babbage-002', 'chatgpt-4o-latest', 'codex-mini-latest', 'computer-use-preview', 'computer-use-preview-2025-03-11', 'davinci-002', 'gpt-3.5-turbo', 'gpt-3.5-turbo-0125', 'gpt-3.5-turbo-1106', 'gpt-3.5-turbo-16k', 'gpt-3.5-turbo-instruct', 'gpt-3.5-turbo-instruct-0914', 'gpt-4', 'gpt-4-0125-preview', 'gpt-4-0613', 'gpt-4-1106-preview', 'gpt-4-turbo', 'gpt-4-turbo-2024-04-09', 'gpt-4-turbo-preview', 'gpt-4.1', 'gpt-4.1-2025-04-14', 'gpt-4.1-mini', 'gpt-4.1-mini-2025-04-14', 'gpt-4.1-nano', 'gpt-4.1-nano-2025-04-14', 'gpt-4o', 'gpt-4o-2024-05-13', 'gpt-4o-2024-08-06', 'gpt-4o-2024-11-20', 'gpt-4o-audio-preview', 'gpt-4o-audio-preview-2024-10-01', 'gpt-4o-audio-preview-2024-12-17', 'gpt-4o-audio-preview-2025-06-03', 'gpt-4o-mini', 'gpt-4o-mini-2024-07-18', 'gpt-4o-mini-audio-preview', 'gpt-4o-mini-audio-preview-2024-12-17', 'gpt-4o-mini-realtime-preview', 'gpt-4o-mini-realtime-preview-2024-12-17', 'gpt-4o-mini-search-preview', 'gpt-4o-mini-search-preview-2025-03-11', 'gpt-4o-mini-transcribe', 'gpt-4o-mini-tts', 'gpt-4o-realtime-preview', 'gpt-4o-realtime-preview-2024-10-01', 'gpt-4o-realtime-preview-2024-12-17', 'gpt-4o-realtime-preview-2025-06-03', 'gpt-4o-search-preview', 'gpt-4o-search-preview-2025-03-11', 'gpt-4o-transcribe', 'gpt-5', 'gpt-5-2025-08-07', 'gpt-5-chat-latest', 'gpt-5-mini', 'gpt-5-mini-2025-08-07', 'gpt-5-nano', 'gpt-5-nano-2025-08-07', 'gpt-audio', 'gpt-audio-2025-08-28', 'gpt-image-1', 'gpt-realtime', 'gpt-realtime-2025-08-28', 'o1', 'o1-2024-12-17', 'o1-mini', 'o1-mini-2024-09-12', 'o1-pro', 'o1-pro-2025-03-19', 'o3', 'o3-2025-04-16', 'o3-mini', 'o3-mini-2025-01-31', 'o4-mini', 'o4-mini-2025-04-16', 'o4-mini-deep-research', 'o4-mini-deep-research-2025-06-26', 'omni-moderation-2024-09-26', 'omni-moderation-latest', 'tts-1', 'tts-1-1106', 'tts-1-hd', 'tts-1-hd-1106']
model.title: Model

temperature.description: Plugin.spec.prompt.temperature[float] Optional. The temperature of the Plugin. Defaults to 0.5. Should be between 0 and 1.0. The higher the temperature, the more creative the response. The lower the temperature, the more predictable the response.
temperature.title: Temperature

maxTokens.description: Plugin.spec.prompt.maxTokens[int]. Optional. The maxTokens of the Plugin. Defaults to 2048. The maximum number of tokens the LLM should generate in the prompt response.
maxTokens.title: Maxtokens

SAMPluginCommonSpecPrompt.title: SAMPluginCommonSpecPrompt

SAMPluginCommonSpecSelector.description: Smarter API Plugin Manifest - Spec - Selector class.

directive.description: Plugin.spec.selector.directive[str]: Required. the kind of selector directive to use for the Plugin. Must be one of: ['search_terms', 'always', 'llm']
directive.title: Directive

searchTerms.description: Plugin.spec.selector.searchTerms[list]. Optional. The keyword search terms to use when the Plugin directive is 'search_terms'. Keywords are most effective when constrained to 1 or 2 words each and lists are limited to a few dozen items.
searchTerms.title: Searchterms

SAMPluginCommonSpecSelector.title: SAMPluginCommonSpecSelector

SAMPluginCommonStatus.description: Smarter API Plugin Manifest - Status class.

accountNumber.description: Plugin.status.account_number: The account owner of this Plugin. Read only.
accountNumber.title: Accountnumber

username.description: Plugin.status.account_number: The Smarter user who created this Plugin. Read only.
username.title: Username

created.description: Plugin.status.created: The date in which this Plugin was created. Read only.
created.title: Created

modified.description: Plugin.status.modified: The date in which this Plugin was most recently changed. Read only.
modified.title: Modified

SAMPluginCommonStatus.title: SAMPluginCommonStatus

SAMSqlPluginSpec.description: Smarter API SqlData Connection Manifest SqlConnection.spec

selector.description: Plugin.spec.selector[obj]: the selector logic to use for the Plugin

prompt.description: Plugin.spec.prompt[obj]: the LLM prompt engineering to apply to the Plugin

connection.description: SqlPlugin.spec.selector[obj]: the name of an existing SqlConnector to use for the SqlPlugin
connection.title: Connection

sqlData.description: SqlPlugin.spec.selector[obj]: the SqlData to use for the SqlPlugin

SAMSqlPluginSpec.title: SAMSqlPluginSpec

SqlData.description: Smarter API - generic API Connection class.

sqlQuery.description: The SQL query that this plugin will execute when invoked by the user prompt.
sqlQuery.title: Sqlquery

parameters.description: A JSON dict containing parameter names and data types. Example: {'unit': {'type': 'string', 'enum': ['Celsius', 'Fahrenheit'], 'description': 'The temperature unit to use.'}}
parameters.title: Parameters

testValues.description: A JSON dict containing test values for each parameter. Example: {'product_id': 1234}.
testValues.title: Testvalues

limit.description: The maximum number of rows to return from the query. Must be a non-negative integer.
limit.title: Limit

SqlData.title: SqlData

TestValue.description: TestValue class for SqlPlugin and ApiPlugin test values.

name.description: The name of the parameter being tested.
name.title: Name

value.description: The test value for the parameter.
value.title: Value

TestValue.title: TestValue

data.description: Smarter API Manifest - Sql Connection Model

apiVersion.description: apiVersion[String]: Required. The API version of the AbstractSAMBase.
apiVersion.title: Apiversion

kind.description: kind[String]: Required. The kind of resource described by the manifest.
kind.title: Kind

status.description: Plugin.status[obj]: Optional, Read-only. Stateful status information about the Plugin.

data.title: SAMSqlPlugin
